data.body:
OVERLAY CATALOG — dependencies / supply-chain
- Source (Apache/MIT): OpenSSF Scorecard (19 checks=best taxonomy), Google OSV-Scanner, OWASP Dependency-Check, Trivy/Grype (EPSS+KEV severity), pip-audit, GitHub dependency-review-action (MIT; closest PR-time rubric); SLSA + SPDX.
- 7 dimensions: known vulns (CVE/OSV; CVSS+EPSS+KEV); malicious/typosquat/slopsquat (install scripts/obfuscation/behavioral — separate LLM check, audit misses novel); license compatibility (SPDX + copyleft intrusion); pinning/lockfile hygiene (hash pinning; manifest<->lockfile consistency); maintenance health (Scorecard); minimal/justified additions; integrity/provenance (signed releases, SBOM, SLSA).
- Triggers: ecosystem manifest+lockfile globs (package.json/lock, requirements/poetry.lock/uv.lock, go.mod/sum, Cargo.toml/lock, Gemfile/lock, pom.xml/build.gradle, composer, *.csproj).
- Deterministic escalation: manifest changed WITHOUT matching lockfile change.
- Scanner pre-pass: OSV-Scanner/Scorecard/Grype as ground truth; LLM-judge over findings + typosquat/justification dims.
- LICENSE FLAG: Snyk proprietary (concept-only); Socket product-docs (concepts not text); ScanCode LicenseDB CC-BY-4.0 (attribution IF embedded — avoid via public-domain SPDX ids). Not blocked.
